sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50959" key="i)/sqi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἴσθι</orth>, <sense id="n50959.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">know</tr_>, imper. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οἶδα</foreign>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n50959.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἴσθι</orth>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">be</tr_>, imper. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εἰμί</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
